description: Output schema for source-tagged Markdown sections created after PDF-to-Markdown conversion and before claim extraction.

section_id.description: Stable unique identifier for the section within a run.

source_year.description: Pakistan Economic Survey year folder, for example 2015-16.

source_md_path.description: Repository-relative path to the converted Markdown file used as input.

source_pdf_path.description: Repository-relative path to the original source PDF. Raw PDF must not be modified.

sector.description: Sector or chapter label derived from the source Markdown/PDF filename or manifest.

heading_text.description: Nearest Markdown heading or inferred local heading text for the section.

start_page.description: First source PDF page marker covered by the section.

end_page.description: Last source PDF page marker covered by the section.

section_type.description: Simple section category such as heading_section, paragraph_block, table_or_figure_adjacent, annex_note, supplement_note, or other.

text.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim Markdown text for the section. No summaries or interpretations.

numeric_or_table_sensitive.description: True when the section contains or depends on tables, charts, exact numbers, rankings, totals, percentages, or figure/table text.

markdown_quality_flags.description: Quality flags such as table_layout_noise, figure_text, broken_words, page_order_noise, omitted_picture_placeholder, or none.
